input.background: For the scenarios presented here, identify the source population and sample as specifically as possible. If information is insufficient, do your best to provide a reasonable description of the population and sample and then suggest additional.
input.question: The sample consists of the 18 diabetics in the study. The population consists of 35 to 44-year old male diabetics.

output.answer: It would be useful to know other person, place, and time factors that define the source population.

sample_size.description: The number of diabetics included in the study sample.

population_description.description: The demographic description of the population being studied.
